author: sofiabod
name: Packed N-gram Artifact + Two-Pass Full Rescore + Hierarchical Dirichlet CTW
blurb: Pre-compute order-13 n-gram tables from training shards, pack in artifact. Two-pass eval: pass 1 scores + builds val cache, pass 2 rescores all positions with full cache using hierarchical Dirichlet CTW mixing (c=5.0). 2-layer 128d neural model (vestigial). Cache does 95%+ of the work.
